untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of order flow microstructure patterns (unusual order flow, liquidity withdrawal, spread widening, correlation shift, skew change), pattern recognition confidence scoring (confidence > 0.40), and historical episode matching. These require real-time market microstructure data and machine learning pattern classification not available in the allowed indicator set. Additionally, realized vs implied volatility comparison requires option market data. Used hvol_20 and bb_bandwidth as proxies for volatility regime detection, but core pattern recognition logic cannot be fully expressed.
translation_notes: Translated volatility percentile trigger (50th) to hvol_20 > 0.50 as approximate proxy. Used bb_bandwidth widening as proxy for liquidity/spread conditions. Entry/exit on realized volatility changes approximated with hvol thresholds. Pattern confidence threshold (0.40) and order flow analysis require external microstructure data unavailable in standard OHLCV indicators. Hold period set to 5 days per exit conditions. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification.
